parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.APOLLO_API_KEY, q_organization_num_employees_ranges: ['11,200','201,1000'], person_titles: ['CEO','CTO','COO','Head of Operations','VP Sales','Founder'], person_locations: ['France','Belgium','Switzerland','Canada'], contact_email_status: ['verified','likely to engage'], page: 1, per_page: 25 }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const leads = $input.first().json.people || [];
console.log('[Apollo] ' + leads.length + ' leads fetched');
return leads.map(p => ({ json: {
  apollo_id: p.id,
  first_name: p.first_name || '',
  last_name: p.last_name || '',
  full_name: (p.first_name || '') + ' ' + (p.last_name || ''),
  email: p.email || '',
  title: p.title || '',
  linkedin_url: p.linkedin_url || '',
  company: p.organization?.name || '',
  company_domain: p.organization?.primary_domain || '',
  company_size: p.organization?.num_employees || 0,
  company_industry: p.organization?.industry || '',
  company_country: p.organization?.country || '',
  company_technologies: p.organization?.technology_names || [],
  seniority: p.seniority || '',
  fetched_at: new Date().toISOString()
}}));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.email }] }], properties: ['email', 'hs_lead_status', 'lifecyclestage'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 500, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B sales intelligence expert for AI/automation services targeting SMBs. Score this prospect and return ONLY valid JSON: {"icp_score":75,"icp_segment":"HOT","pain_points":["pain1","pain2"],"automation_opportunities":["opp1"],"personalization_hook":"one compelling opening line","recommended_service":"n8n_automation","email_subject":"subject line","email_tone":"executive"}. Segments: HOT(>=80), WARM(60-79), COLD(40-59). Score based on: company size 20-500(+20pts), tech industry(+20pts), decision-maker title(+20pts), known tech stack(+15pts), intent signals(+25pts).' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Score: Name=' + $json.full_name + ' Title=' + $json.title + ' Company=' + $json.company + '(' + $json.company_industry + ',' + $json.company_size + ' employees) Country=' + $json.company_country + ' Tech=' + ($json.company_technologies || []).join(',') }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { email: $json.email, firstname: $json.first_name, lastname: $json.last_name, jobtitle: $json.title, company: $json.company, hs_lead_status: $json.icp_segment, hubspot_score: $json.icp_score, lifecyclestage: $json.icp_score >= 80 ? 'salesqualifiedlead' : 'lead', website: 'https://' + ($json.company_domain || ''), source: 'apollo_autopilot' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 300, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are Oussama Abassi, an expert n8n automation and AI agent developer. Write a highly personalized cold email in French (max 100 words). Rules: start with the personalization hook directly, mention their specific company/situation, one concrete problem, one specific solution, one CTA (15-min call). Conversational peer-to-peer tone, not salesy. End with: Oussama A. | Automation & IA | oussama.dev. Return ONLY the email body text, no subject.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Write email for: ' + $json.first_name + ', ' + $json.title + ' at ' + $json.company + '(' + $json.company_industry + '). Pain points: ' + ($json.pain_points || []).join(', ') + '. Hook: ' + $json.personalization_hook + '. Service: ' + $json.recommended_service }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.email, name: $json.full_name }] }], from: { email: 'oussama@oussama.dev', name: 'Oussama A.' }, reply_to: { email: 'oussama@oussama.dev' }, subject: $json.email_subject, content: [{ type: 'text/plain', value: $json.email_body }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.email }] }], properties: ['hs_email_open', 'hs_email_click', 'hs_sales_email_last_replied'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 200, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Write a short follow-up email in French (max 60 words). Reference the first email naturally. Add new value with a specific use case. End with a low-commitment CTA (yes/no question or 15-min call). Conversational tone. Return ONLY the email body.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Follow-up for ' + $json.first_name + ' at ' + $json.company + '(' + $json.company_industry + '). First email was about: ' + $json.recommended_service + ' for: ' + ($json.pain_points || [])[0] }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.email, name: $json.full_name }] }], from: { email: 'oussama@oussama.dev', name: 'Oussama A.' }, subject: 'Re: ' + $json.email_subject, content: [{ type: 'text/plain', value: $json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '' }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $json.email }] }], properties: ['hs_sales_email_last_replied'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🔥 *HOT LEAD — Réponse reçue !*

*Prospect:* ' + $json.full_name + '
*Titre:* ' + $json.title + ' @ ' + $json.company + '
*Score ICP:* ' + $json.icp_score + '/100 (' + $json.icp_segment + ')
*Service recommandé:* ' + $json.recommended_service + '

*Pain points:*
' + ($json.pain_points || []).map(p => '• ' + p).join('
') + '

LinkedIn: ' + $json.linkedin_url }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { dealname: $json.company + ' — ' + $json.recommended_service, dealstage: 'appointmentscheduled', pipeline: 'default', amount: $json.icp_score >= 80 ? 1500 : 800, closedate: new Date(Date.now() + 30*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0], deal_source: 'apollo_autopilot' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.email, name: $json.full_name }] }], from: { email: 'oussama@oussama.dev', name: 'Oussama A.' }, subject: '📅 15 minutes — ' + $json.company + ' × Oussama', content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: '

Bonjour ' + $json.first_name + ',

Merci pour votre retour. Je serais ravi d'échanger 15 minutes pour vous montrer concrètement comment j'aborderais votre situation chez ' + $json.company + '.

→ Choisir un créneau (15 min)

À très vite,
Oussama A.
Automation & IA | oussama.dev

' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', temperature: 0.4, max_tokens: 400, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'Generate a concise pre-meeting briefing (max 200 words) for a sales call. Include: company overview, 3 likely challenges, 3 talking points, 3 qualifying questions, recommended solution angle.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Brief for: ' + $json.full_name + ', ' + $json.title + ' at ' + $json.company + '. Industry: ' + $json.company_industry + '. Size: ' + $json.company_size + ' employees. Tech: ' + ($json.company_technologies || []).join(', ') + '. Pain points: ' + ($json.pain_points || []).join(', ') + '. Service: ' + $json.recommended_service }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: 'oussama@oussama.dev' }] }], from: { email: 'oussama@oussama.dev', name: 'Pipeline B2B' }, subject: '📋 Brief pré-RDV — ' + $json.full_name + ' / ' + $json.company, content: [{ type: 'text/html', value: '

Brief pré-RDV

' + $json.title + ' @ ' + $json.company + ' (' + $json.company_industry + ', ' + $json.company_size + ' emp.)

Score ICP: ' + $json.icp_score + '/100 | Service: ' + $json.recommended_service + '

Analyse IA :

' + ($json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || '') + '

LinkedIn: ' + $json.linkedin_url + '

' }] }) }}

parameters.content:
## 🚀 B2B Revenue Intelligence & Outreach Autopilot

**Variables d'env requises (Settings > Variables) :**
• OPENAI_API_KEY
• APOLLO_API_KEY
• HUBSPOT_TOKEN
• SENDGRID_API_KEY
• GDRIVE_ACCESS_TOKEN
• OUTREACH_SHEET_ID
• SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL

**Flux principal :**
1. Schedule 08h → Apollo fetch leads ICP
2. Code normalize leads
3. Split 1 par 1
4. IF email présent?
5. HubSpot check doublons
6. IF nouveau lead?
7. GPT-4o ICP score 0-100
8. IF score >= 40?
9. HubSpot créer contact
10. GPT-4o email ultra-personnalisé
11. SendGrid envoi email #1
12. Google Sheets log
13. Wait 3 jours
14. HubSpot check ouverture
15. IF ouvert → follow-up GPT-4o J+3
16. Wait 4 jours
17. HubSpot check réponse
18. IF réponse → Slack alert + Deal + Calendly
19. GPT-4o brief pré-RDV
20. Email brief à Oussama
